note: Only the S2 'Encore' block needs overriding. S1 is left to the parser (its full-charge block -> team Projectile Explosion 20% / Pierce 13.09% / ATK 20% of caster for 3s is faithful; the Performance-status sub-block is only heal-potency + Gains Pierce, both skipped as defensive/inert). Burst is left to the parser (Charge Damage +25%/25s to allies is faithful; the HP-regen effect skipped as a heal). S2: the 'entering Full Burst -> Max HP +19.98%' block is skipped (defensive HP buff). The Encore itself fires 'when Sing Along takes effect while in Performance' -- Sing Along/Performance is an untracked mechanic, so I approximate it as firing once per rotation on Full Burst entry (Prika is in Performance then). Encore grants allies Attack Damage +25.01% for 10s and INCREASES her own Burst cooldown by 21s (the ▲ is an increase — the price of the Performance extension), applied once per her own burst cast. UNCERTAIN: the once-per-full-burst cadence for the team Attack Damage buff is an approximation of the Sing Along trigger. The 'Performance duration +21 sec' and 'Singing part assignment' Encore effects are not modeled (Performance is an untracked status; part assignment is inert). MODES ADDED (tier audit, Prydwen): duet 'Ad Infinitum' — Mint's Sing Along re-extends Performance forever and 'she only needs to Burst once' -> duet mode: burst once (self CD +9999 after cast), Performance charge-damage 25% and Encore Attack Damage 25.01% permanent. Solo mode: 25s Performance per burst, Encore per-FB as before. DUET SLOT ORDER: place Prika LEFT of Mint so she takes rotation 1 and Mint all later rotations. DUET ORDER RULE (user, 2026-07-13): when Mint+Prika are the only B2s, Prika ALWAYS takes the first B2 and Mint every one after — now slot-order-independent via the burstFirst effect (duet mode); the old 'place Prika left of Mint' requirement is gone. [materialized 2026-07-16: skill1 auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose) — behavior-identical to the prior runtime parse; NOT hand-verified] [re-materialized 2026-07-16: skill1 re-frozen with the upgraded offline parser (skill-user's-ATK→casterAtkPct, used-their-Burst→burstCasters, Reload Speed stat, DEF→defPct, shield event) — still NOT hand-verified]

skill1: Gains Pierce. This effect is continuous.
skill2: Effect 1: Affects the member who initiated Sing Along. Assigned Part: Singing. This effect is continuous and cannot be removed.
Effect 2: Affects all allies. Performance duration ▲ 21 sec.
burst: Effect 1: Restores 3.04% of the skill user's final max HP as HP every 1 sec for 25 sec. This effect cannot be removed.

caveats: Encore is a proxy: the real trigger is 'Sing Along takes effect while Prika is in Performance' (a partner mechanic, e.g. Mint) — solo mode fires it on EVERY Full Burst entry even in teams with no Sing Along caster (over-credits the ally Attack Damage ▲ 25.01% AND over-applies the self Burst-cooldown ▲ 21s).

Prika's kit grants her continuous Pierce while in Performance, but the override carries no Pierce tag (hasPierce) — her own Pierce Damage ▲ 13.09% and any partner Pierce buffs do not land on her (held pending a popup measurement, probe-runs 2026-07-14).
The burst Performance heal (3.04% of caster max HP per sec, 25s) is not emitted as recovery events — 'when recovery takes effect' consumer kits (Crown-type) will not proc off Prika.
Encore's 'Performance duration ▲ 21 sec' is unmodeled — in solo mode the burst's Charge Damage ▲ 25% (and heal) run 25s instead of an extended ~46s when Encore fires.
